note: TVI overrides taxonomy term-listing pages with a chosen View, resolved per-term / per-vocabulary / global with a precedence chain, stored in config objects. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) since they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want a specific vocabulary's taxonomy term pages to render a custom View instead of the default term listing. Which contrib module does this and how does it hook into the term page?
evals.expected_output: Taxonomy Views Integrator (tvi). It alters the entity.taxonomy_term.canonical route to its own controller (after Views) and renders the View chosen for the term/vocabulary.

evals.prompt: Using Taxonomy Views Integrator, where do I set the View+display for a single taxonomy term versus for an entire vocabulary?
evals.expected_output: TVI injects a settings fieldset onto the taxonomy term edit form (per term) and the vocabulary edit form (per vocabulary); tick 'enable override' and pick a View + display.

evals.prompt: In Taxonomy Views Integrator, which config objects store the View override for the global default, for one vocabulary, and for one term?
evals.expected_output: tvi.global_settings (site-wide), tvi.taxonomy_vocabulary.{vid} (per vocabulary), and tvi.taxonomy_term.{tid} (per term).

evals.prompt: With Taxonomy Views Integrator, if a term has its own View override AND its vocabulary has one, which wins? Describe the full precedence order used to pick the View for a term page.
evals.expected_output: Highest to lowest: per-term override, then inheriting vocabulary/parent-term override (enable_override + inherit_settings), then global override, then the core default taxonomy_term:page_1 View (unless disable_default_view is set). The term's own override wins over the vocabulary's.

evals.prompt: In Taxonomy Views Integrator, which setting makes a vocabulary's or parent term's chosen View apply to child terms that don't have their own override?
must_contain_any: Child terms will use these settings
evals.expected_output: The inherit_settings option ('Child terms will use these settings'); a vocabulary/parent override only cascades to children when both enable_override and inherit_settings are true.

evals.prompt: What permissions does Taxonomy Views Integrator provide, and which one controls access to the global settings form versus setting a View on a specific vocabulary?
evals.expected_output: 'administer taxonomy views integrator' gates the global settings form; dynamic per-vocabulary permissions 'define view for vocabulary {vid}' and 'define view for terms in {vid}' gate the vocabulary and term edit fieldsets respectively.

evals.prompt: What is the admin path and route name for the global settings form of Taxonomy Views Integrator?
evals.expected_output: Route tvi.global_settings at /admin/config/user-interface/tvi (Admin -> Configuration -> User interface -> Taxonomy Views Integrator).

evals.prompt: In Taxonomy Views Integrator, which per-term/per-vocabulary setting sends all trailing URL arguments after /taxonomy/term/ to the View, and what does the View receive if it is off?
evals.expected_output: The pass_arguments setting; when on, all args after /taxonomy/term/ are passed to the View, when off the View only receives the term id (tid) and tid_depth.
